<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 1920 1080" font-family="'Segoe UI', Arial, sans-serif">
  <defs>
    <!-- Backgrounds -->
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#0f172a"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#1e293b"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="card" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#1e293b"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#0f172a"/>
    </linearGradient>
    
    <!-- Metallic Industrial Gradients -->
    <linearGradient id="steelGradient" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="0">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#334155"/>
      <stop offset="0.5" stop-color="#475569"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#334155"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="espHousing" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="0">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#1e293b"/><stop offset="0.5" stop-color="#334155"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#1e293b"/>
    </linearGradient>
    
    <!-- Smoke Gradient -->
    <linearGradient id="smokeGrad" x1="0" y1="1" x2="0" y2="0">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#94a3b8" stop-opacity="0.6"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#475569" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </linearGradient>
    
    <!-- Flow Arrow Marker -->
    <marker id="flowArrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto">
      <path d="M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 Z" fill="#22d3ee"/>
    </marker>
    
    <!-- Conveyor Belt Pattern -->
    <pattern id="conveyorPattern" x="0" y="0" width="10" height="10" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
       <path d="M0,5 L5,0 L10,5" fill="none" stroke="#22d3ee" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.3"/>
    </pattern>

    <!-- Glow Filter for Active Elements -->
    <filter id="neonGlow" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="2.5" result="coloredBlur"/>
      <feMerge>
        <feMergeNode in="coloredBlur"/>
        <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/>
      </feMerge>
    </filter>
  </defs>

  <!-- BACKGROUND -->
  <rect width="1920" height="1080" fill="url(#bg)"/>

  <!-- HEADER -->
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="1920" height="84" fill="#020617"/>
  <rect x="0" y="82" width="1920" height="2" fill="#1e3a5f"/>
  
  <!-- Header Content -->
  <text x="32" y="34" fill="#fbbf24" font-size="12" letter-spacing="4">LITMUS EDGE  ·  SP4 SINTER PLANT</text>
  <text x="32" y="64" fill="#e2e8f0" font-size="26" font-weight="700">Process ESP & DDESP — Gas Cleaning System</text>
  
  <!-- Live Indicator Pulse -->
  <circle cx="1820" cy="50" r="4" fill="#ef4444">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" values="1;0.2;1" dur="1s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="1832" y="54" fill="#ef4444" font-size="10" font-weight="bold">LIVE</text>
  
  <text x="1888" y="34" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="12" text-anchor="end"> 18 TR transformers · 4 ESP stages · 7 conveyors · 8 aux motors</text>
  <text x="1888" y="58" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="12" text-anchor="end">DDESP dashboard</text>
  <text x="1888" y="76" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="11" text-anchor="end" id="header_updated">Updated --:--:--</text>

  <!-- TOP KPI CARDS -->
  <g transform="translate(16,98)">
    <rect width="460" height="76" rx="10" fill="url(#card)" stroke="#1e3a5f"/>
    <text x="18" y="24" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="11" letter-spacing="2">SINTER M/C CURRENT</text>

  </g>

    <circle id="wgf_speed_actual_status_dot" cx="444" cy="18" r="5" fill="#64748b"/>
  </g>
